Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Attendance And Testimony Ot Deposition And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule the deposition. The deposition is to be completed by October 14, 2005. Failure to appear at deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $552.30 are to be paid on or before October 14, 2005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
